nasb.text: He shall then sprinkle seven times the one who is to be cleansed from the leprosy and shall pronounce him clean, and shall let the live bird go free over the open field.

esv.text: And he shall sprinkle it seven times on him who is to be cleansed of the leprous disease. Then he shall pronounce him clean and shall let the living bird go into the open field.

cnv.text: 然後向那患痲風病求潔淨的人身上彈七次，就可以宣布他潔淨；又讓那隻活鳥飛到田野去。

ccb.text: 祭司要用鸟血在他身上洒七次，宣布他是洁净的，然后放走那只活鸟，让它飞向田野。
